title: Wolf's More Ores
description: A simple mod that adds exciting new, simple ores to your world!
body:
![ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83b44770fe1a624d2b02d270ded3cb298b60d3b0_0.webp)
# Wolf's More Ores!
This mod adds a total of **14** new ores:
- **7** from the **overworld**
- **2** from the **nether**
- **3** from the **end**
- and another **3** that you obtain via **merging them with a diffrent ore**

_JEI or any recipe mod will be very helpful!_
# Ore list:
## 1. TIN
![tin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d42d08fbc302028c959bebf3e70aacaed31cd832_0.webp)

Tin is **a common ore**, and its used to **combine with copper**, making bronze
## 2. BRONZE
![bronze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73111ea256fe058f70ed50ebed51786b513d16ed_0.webp)

Bronze is an ore that does **not spawn naturally**, it is obtained by **merging a copper and tin ingot together**
![bronzecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23581c5799db3f03fddd412303f0e3f1bfda5137_0.webp)
## 3. PLATNIUM
![platnium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b5c2e08aceb04e25e24fc58e0b2e8eb714f26bb_0.webp)

Platnium generates naturally, **it is a stronger, rarer version of iron**, used for tools and armour
## 4. JADE
![jade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/565ac91abcc1b8a241b91f7f56329f1822cd469c.png)

Jade is a material **similar to the speed of diamond tools**, however it has **less durability** than diamond
## 5. RUBY
![ruby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72e84d9eb5ca7033c1e50f4afb029e4073cd9cfa_0.webp)

A **red gem** that is something **inbetween diamond and emerald**
## 6. SAPPHIRE
![sapphire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a240af7e248276a63391739ed299dcc4cc0a4ff6.png)

Another **blue gem** just like diamond, very similar to ruby
## 7. SILVER
![silver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08eb6b38c798cb630c80c8f5c0bf0aa65ed2e927_0.webp)

An ore that is **extremly similar to gold**, however it has a **bit more durablilty** and is **slower than gold**
![silverapplecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f38501eb548fa8195ebc5d321c64bf4fa14ebbd.png)

It can also be used a craft a **silver apple**
## 8. TITANIUM
![titamnium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b71fcb0cceb760d4cb46c9ca48b293ca4704f9d1_0.webp)

Titanium is a **strong alloy** made from merging iron and platnium together
![carafttitanuij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cb6ff0e4f2a67b2a753235513c1a4db0a385782.png)

However, it is most useful for **smithing** as you can smith it with **netherite or magnetite**, without the need of obtaining **diamond armour** first
## 9. OPAL
![oapl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20b8a9cf2f661db0b3dc393e943bbff02c22c7a6_0.webp)

Opal is a **colorful** and **extremly rare gem** spawning in the overworld, it is also the **strongest of all overworld ores**
## 10. BLACK OPAL
![blackopal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61a8b78e45b83501f87dd03023ee2a58249ef1ee_0.webp)

A **black variation of opal**, which spawns in the nether and has the **best efficiency** out of all the nether ores but **not as much durability**
## 11. MAGNETITE
![magnetite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de65c2c0d2b88ea7e1b60d1e9545aecbc810ca7c_0.webp)

An ore that **spawns in the nether**, similar to the **lodestone block**, **weaker version of netherite**, tho it is easier to obtain. Crafted and smithed just like netherite.
## 12. WOLFRAMITE
![wolfratmie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1423cba8dad99185ac9f57ec998297c4edc4a658_0.webp)

An ore **exclusive to the end**, merged with **scheelite** to make **tungsten**
## 13. SCHEELITE
![schellite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec76909352351db6fc0e1ace3aff2f3a94ae9163_0.webp)

Another ore that **spawns in the end**, just like **wolframite** it is used to **craft tungsten**
## 14. TUNGSTEN
![tingsten](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4af5581248beb0706b488f61317852c4a5bbf48f_0.webp)

The strongest alloy from the mod, stronger than netherite. It does not spawn naturally and has the be merged using wolframite, scheelite and gold
![tungsahur](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8370002a5d3ac9980ea86f1a489e90548b601379.png)
To craft it, you need 4 wolframite ingots, 4 scheelite ingots and one gold ingot
